title: Model-Based Shared Autonomy for Robust Teleoperation
subtitle: MS Thesis — Completed May 2026
subheader: For my MS thesis, my project was to develop a teleoperation system for an mobile manipulator robot.

content.value: Thank you to my advisor, Shenlong Wang, for his help and guidance through this thesis, as well as the rest of the ReasonNav team: Henry Che, Gloria Wang, and Wenzhou Ding.
